development.SDK_prog_lang_list: C++; Go; Groovy; HTML; Java; Kotlin; Python; Swift; TypeScript

social.GIT_prog_lang_list: C++; Go; Groovy; HTML/CSS; Java; Kotlin; Python; Ruby; Swift; TypeScript

evidence.API_evidence: Multiple APIs documented including Maps API, Routing APIs, Places APIs, Traffic APIs, Tracking & Logistics APIs. Pricing page shows API endpoints and request pricing.
evidence.SDK_evidence: Maps & Navigation SDK for Android and iOS documented. ADAS SDK mentioned. GitHub repositories show SDK examples and libraries in multiple programming languages.
evidence.AI_evidence: TomTom MCP Server provides location intelligence to AI applications through Model Context Protocol. Open source MCP server documented.
evidence.language_evidence: All content appears in English. No language switcher found on portal pages.

coding_notes: Platform requires registration (sign in required). APIs documented with GET/POST methods. SDKs available for mobile platforms. MCP server enables AI agent integration. Terms and conditions provide data governance. Free tier available with paid upgrades (OPEN=1).

changes.GIT_prog_lang_list: "Swift; TypeScript; Python; Kotlin; Go; C++; Java; Groovy; HTML; Ruby" → "C++; Go; Groovy; HTML/CSS; Java; Kotlin; Python; Ruby; Swift; TypeScript"
